name: XRM LinkedIn Lead Generation - Draft Only
notes: Local workflow blueprint. Qualifies sample leads and drafts messages. Does not scrape or send messages.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { leads: [ { lead_name: 'Sample Buyer', company: 'Sample Hospitality Developer', title: 'Procurement Director', country: 'Thailand', source: 'manual-sample' }, { lead_name: 'Sample Infrastructure Buyer', company: 'Sample Data Center Builder', title: 'Project Manager', country: 'Singapore', source: 'manual-sample' } ] } }];

const leads = $input.first().json.leads.map(lead => { const text = `${lead.title} ${lead.company}`.toLowerCase(); const segment = text.includes('data center') ? 'AI infrastructure buyer' : 'hotel procurement buyer'; return { ...lead, segment, fit_score: segment.includes('hotel') ? 82 : 78, recommended_angle: segment.includes('hotel') ? 'Hotel FF&E/OS&E procurement support from China' : 'AI infrastructure supporting products from China', manual_review_required: true }; }); return [{ json: { generated_by_ai: true, status: 'pending-review', workflow: 'linkedin-lead-generation-local', leads } }];

const item = $input.first().json; item.leads = item.leads.map(lead => ({ ...lead, draft_message: `Hello ${lead.lead_name}, I work on China procurement coordination for ${lead.segment.includes('hotel') ? 'hotel FF&E/OS&E projects' : 'AI infrastructure supporting products'}. If you are comparing suppliers or preparing an RFQ, I would be glad to share a structured sourcing approach.`, send_automatically: false })); item.review_checklist = ['Confirm lead source is compliant', 'Review message manually', 'Do not auto-send', 'Remove confidential project references', 'Log approved outreach manually']; return [{ json: item }];
